title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Nexus Select Trust - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Nexus Select Trust - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Nexus Select Trust, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Chennai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Nexus Select Trust:
Nexus Select Trust is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nexus Select Trust!
